name: Pasta & Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the cheeses, egg whites, thyme, oregano, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Set aside.
3. Steam broccoli, onions, carrots, and celery until the broccoli is crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Add pasta and oil to a large pot of boiling water and cook until the pasta is just tender but still firm to the bite, about 5 minutes.
5. Drain the pasta and return it to the pot.
6. Add the steamed vegetables and toss.
7. Add the cheese mixture and toss again.
8. Transfer to a serving bowl.
9. Spoon tomatoes in the center of the pasta.
10. Garnish the edges with parsley.
